Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "MADSPRINGS-8009" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mad Springs (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the call to the kernal save routine ($F5ED) at $8867 to remove disk access from the game (for high score saving).
